title: agropyron × strictum
intro: Agropyron × strictum, also known as Agropyron strictum, is a hybrid plant species within the wheatgrass family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Agropyron × strictum include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and reduce inflammation. Agropyron × strictum can be prepared into herbal supplements, teas, and infusions, as well as added to juices and smoothies for its health-promoting effects.
